summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new Rechev IL features: motorcycle support, vehicle price estimation (Pro feature), and fixed disability tag API. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI properly differentiates cars vs motorcycles with appropriate Pro/Free user access controls.

minor_bugs.issue: Checkout status returns 404 for valid session IDs
minor_bugs.impact: Non-critical - Stripe checkout flow still works

ui_bugs.issue: 2 fields still show 'Pro' lock for authenticated Pro users

passed_tests: Car plate 1234567 returns is_motorcycle=false with price data
Motorcycle plate 21076803 returns is_motorcycle=true without price data
Demo Pro user authentication (demo_pro_session_token) returns plan=pro
Car vehicle page shows price card blurred for free users
Car vehicle page shows unlocked price card for Pro users with estimated value ₪52,936 — ₪64,699
Motorcycle vehicle page shows orange motorcycle badge and no price card
Motorcycle license plate has orange border styling
Disability tag API uses corrected endpoint
Vehicle search and theft check APIs working
Auth APIs properly validate session tokens

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, 1 minor UI issue)
